prose.en: Notify the user, upon successful logon, of changes to {param:ac-09.03_odp.01} during {param:ac-09.03_odp.02}.

guidance.en: Information about changes to security-related account characteristics within a specified time period allows users to recognize if changes were made without their knowledge.

prose.en: the user is notified, upon successful logon, of changes to {param:ac-09.03_odp.01} during {param:ac-09.03_odp.02}.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing access control policy for previous logon notification

guidelines.en: changes to security-related characteristics or parameters of the user’s account that require notification are defined;

ac-09.03_odp.01.alt-label: security-related characteristics or parameters of the user’s account

guidelines.en: the time period for which the system notifies the user of changes to security-related characteristics or parameters of the user’s account is defined;
